text:
audio/libamrnb update to 11.0.0.0

Fix: extract patches from the shell archive.
apply audio.libamrnb.diff to audio/libamrnb.
apply audio.libamrwb.diff to audio/libamrwb.
apply security.p5-Mcrypt.diff to security/p5-Mcrypt.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: # portlint /usr/ports/security/p5-Mcrypt/

1 fatal error and 0 warnings found.
